tasks.title: Remove old skill files from repo
tasks.notes: Deleted skill/ directory, old PLAN.md, progress.json, feedback.md, roadmap/skill-redesign-plan.md.

tasks.title: Remove installed skill copies from user home
VERIFY: Phase 0 — Cleanup
tasks.notes: Phase 0 APPROVED by PM. All 186 existing tests pass. Branch: feat/tui.

tasks.title: Add Ink dependencies and JSX support
tasks.notes: Added ink ^5.0.1, react ^18.3.1, tsx ^4.19.3 to package.json. Updated bin/plug.js to register tsx/esm/api loader before dynamic import of src/index.js. Added no-arg TUI launch (process.argv.length <= 2) and 'plug tui' subcommand in src/index.js. Verified: node bin/plug.js renders 'PlugVault' tab bar; node bin/plug.js --help shows all commands including 'tui'; 186/186 tests pass. Note: ink-use-input does not exist as a separate npm package — useInput is built into Ink 5.x.

tasks.title: Create tab-bar and app shell
tasks.notes: Created src/tui/app.jsx (activeTab state, left/right arrow switching, Esc to exit), src/tui/components/tab-bar.jsx (3 tabs: Discover/Installed/Vaults, active tab bold+underlined with bracket highlight), src/tui/components/hotkey-bar.jsx (context-sensitive key hints per tab). App renders with border box layout. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create package-list and package-item components
tasks.notes: Created src/tui/components/package-item.jsx (2-line row: checkbox + cursor + name/vault/version + type badge on line 1, description on line 2, truncated to terminal width). Created src/tui/components/package-list.jsx (viewport windowing with row-height awareness, up/down cursor, scroll indicators, Space to toggle, Enter callback, isActive guard). Verified rendering with mock data. 186/186 tests pass.
